title: iOS 开发踩坑记录
purpose: 从脱敏后的真实 iOS / Swift 踩坑记录抽取结构化诊断知识，供 Agent 按症状、日志关键词和排查路径快速匹配。

categories.name: CloudKit / CKShare
categories.summary: CloudKit schema、CKAsset 拉取、共享身份与权限、同步并发及系统分享 UI。
categories.summaryEn: CloudKit schema, CKAsset fetching, share identity and permissions, sync concurrency, and system sharing UI.

categories.name: SwiftUI / Navigation
categories.summary: SwiftUI 浮层、导航时序、ViewBuilder metadata 与根部 chrome。
categories.summaryEn: SwiftUI overlays, navigation timing, ViewBuilder metadata, and root chrome behavior.

categories.name: WidgetKit
categories.summary: Home Screen Widget 容器背景、透明玻璃效果与 descriptor 风险。
categories.summaryEn: Home Screen Widget host backgrounds, transparent glass effects, and descriptor risks.

categories.name: SwiftData / Core Data
categories.summary: 外部存储、fetch 完整性、blob 损坏、NSException 与云端写入安全。
categories.summaryEn: External storage, fetch integrity, damaged blobs, NSException crashes, and safe cloud writes.

categories.name: 同步一致性 / 并发
categories.summary: 同步快照、删除推断、async 重入与云端写入安全。
categories.summaryEn: Sync snapshots, deletion inference, async reentrancy, and safe cloud writes.

pitfalls.title: CloudKit CKError 15：生产环境 schema 没部署
pitfalls.symptom: TestFlight / App Store 正式环境 iCloud 同步报 CKErrorDomain 错误 15；本地 Xcode Debug 和早期 TF 包正常，一上正式自己和用户全员同步失败。
pitfalls.rootCause: CKError 15 通常对应 serverRejectedRequest。一个常见的真实原因是 CloudKit Production 环境没有对应 record type / 字段；Development 会自动推断 schema，但 Production 必须手动 Deploy。
check: 确认错误是否是 CKErrorDomain 15 / serverRejectedRequest，而不是普通网络失败。
登录 CloudKit Console，切到 Production 环境，检查目标 record type 是否存在。
打开 Deploy Schema Changes diff，如果 record type / 字段都是 Create，说明 Production schema 没部署。
检查近期是否新增字段，例如 contentSignature / imageVersion 这类字段新增后忘记 Deploy。
fix: 进入 icloud.developer.apple.com，选择正确 container。
在 Schema 的 Development 环境执行 Deploy Schema Changes，把新增 record types / indexes / security roles 部署到 Production。
修好后让用户重开 App 或手动点同步；这是服务端 schema 配置，通常不需要重新发版。
发版前把 CloudKit schema Deploy to Production 加入 checklist；必要时用 cktool export-schema 做版本管理和 CI 比对。
pitfalls.avoid: 不要用 Debug / Development 环境成功来证明 TestFlight 或 App Store 的 CloudKit schema 已经可用。
pitfalls.titleEn: CloudKit CKError 15: Production schema was not deployed
pitfalls.symptomEn: In TestFlight or App Store builds, iCloud sync fails with CKErrorDomain error 15, while local Xcode Debug builds and earlier TestFlight builds work normally. The failure can affect all production users.
pitfalls.rootCauseEn: CKError 15 usually maps to serverRejectedRequest. A common real cause is that the CloudKit Production environment does not contain the required record types or fields. Development can infer schema automatically, but Production requires a manual schema deployment.
checkEn: Confirm the error is CKErrorDomain 15 / serverRejectedRequest, not an ordinary network failure.
Open CloudKit Console, switch to Production, and check whether the target record type exists.
Open the Deploy Schema Changes diff. If the record types or fields appear as Create operations, the Production schema has not been deployed.
Check whether recent code added fields such as content signatures or image versions without a new Production deploy.
fixEn: Open icloud.developer.apple.com and select the correct container.
In the Development schema view, run Deploy Schema Changes to deploy record types, indexes, and security roles to Production.
After the deploy, ask users to relaunch the app or trigger sync again. This is usually a server-side configuration fix and does not require a new app release.
Add CloudKit schema deployment to the release checklist. Consider exporting schema with cktool and checking it in CI.
pitfalls.avoidEn: Do not use a successful Debug / Development run as proof that the TestFlight or App Store CloudKit Production schema is ready.

pitfalls.title: SwiftUI 全屏浮层 / 蒙版盖不住状态栏与导航栏
pitfalls.symptom: 自定义底部弹窗和半透明蒙版在 NavigationStack push 出来的子页面上弹出时，顶部状态栏区域漏白条，导航栏背景有时压在蒙版上；即使把浮层提到 SwiftUI 根 ZStack 并加高 zIndex 仍无效。
pitfalls.rootCause: 问题由祖先裁剪和 UIKit UINavigationBar 合成层叠加造成。zIndex 只管同一 SwiftUI 容器，不能跨出被 clipShape / mask 限制的祖先，也管不到同窗口内 UIKit 导航栏延伸到安全区的图层。
check: 确认问题是否只在 push 出来的子页、带圆角裁剪容器、或顶部安全区特殊处理页面出现。
检查浮层祖先是否存在 clipShape、mask、圆角容器或安全区排除。
判断 zIndex 提高后是否仍盖不住状态栏 / 导航栏背景；如果是，说明仍困在同一个 UIWindow 内。
fix: 不要继续在同一 SwiftUI 视图树里斗层级，改用独立高 windowLevel 的透明 UIWindow 承载浮层。
从 foregroundActive UIWindowScene 创建 UIWindow，并设置 windowLevel = .statusBar + 100。
窗口、UIHostingController view 都设置 backgroundColor = .clear、isOpaque = false。
用单例 controller 强引用 UIWindow，关闭时 window.isHidden = true 并置 nil。
设置 accessibilityViewIsModal = true，让 VoiceOver 焦点限制在浮层内。
pitfalls.avoid: 不要指望 zIndex 能压过 UIKit 导航栏合成层或突破祖先裁剪；真正全屏浮层要跳到更高 UIWindow。
pitfalls.titleEn: SwiftUI full-screen overlays cannot cover the status bar or navigation bar
pitfalls.symptomEn: A custom bottom sheet and translucent scrim fail to cover the top status bar area when presented on a pushed NavigationStack child page. The navigation bar background can appear above the scrim, and moving the overlay to the root ZStack with a high zIndex still does not fix it.
pitfalls.rootCauseEn: Two mechanisms combine inside the same UIWindow: ancestor clipping or masks can prevent the overlay from drawing outside its parent, and UIKit draws UINavigationBar chrome in a separate composition layer. SwiftUI zIndex only orders views inside one SwiftUI container and cannot escape clipping or beat UIKit chrome.
checkEn: Confirm whether the issue appears only on pushed pages, rounded/clipped containers, or pages with special safe-area handling.
Inspect overlay ancestors for clipShape, mask, rounded containers, or safe-area exclusions.
If increasing zIndex still cannot cover the status bar or navigation bar background, the overlay is still trapped inside the same UIWindow.
fixEn: Stop fighting hierarchy inside the same SwiftUI tree. Present the overlay in a separate transparent UIWindow with a higher windowLevel.
Create the UIWindow from the foregroundActive UIWindowScene and set windowLevel = .statusBar + 100.
Set the window and UIHostingController view to backgroundColor = .clear and isOpaque = false.
Keep a strong reference to the UIWindow in a controller. On dismissal, set window.isHidden = true and release the reference.
Set accessibilityViewIsModal = true so VoiceOver focus stays inside the overlay.
pitfalls.avoidEn: Do not expect zIndex to beat UIKit navigation bar composition or escape ancestor clipping. A true full-screen overlay needs a higher UIWindow.

pitfalls.title: push 进二级页面时底部闪白 / 灰条
pitfalls.symptom: NavigationStack push 进入二级页面时，底部先闪一下白底或灰条，然后二级页内容才画出来；问题时有时无，多个二级页都能复现。
pitfalls.rootCause: 根部 chrome 依赖 isInDetail 这类全局标志决定面板是否撑满，但标志在被 push 页面 onAppear 才置位，比页面首帧渲染晚一帧。若用 withAnimation 包全局状态，还可能把 navigation push 卷入同一个动画事务，引发 onAppear/onDisappear 循环、卡死或返回键消失。
check: 观察闪白是否发生在 push 首帧，且之后页面正常。
检查根部 dock、tab、圆角面板等 chrome 是否依赖 onAppear 才更新导航状态。
如果给状态变化套 withAnimation 后出现卡死或返回键消失，优先怀疑动画事务和导航事务纠缠。
fix: 把 NavigationLink(value:) 改为 Button，在路由触发点先同步置位 chrome 状态，再 push。
用 Transaction(disablesAnimations: true) 设置 chromeInDetail，进入详情时瞬间撑满，不做入场动画。
用 DispatchQueue.main.async { path.append(route) } 把真正 push 推迟到下一帧，确保 chrome 已先撑满。
用统一派生量 inDetail = isInDetail || chromeInDetail 驱动面板高度、圆角、dock、tab 栏。
返回首页才做 spring 滑入；进入详情不要复用出场动画。
pitfalls.avoid: 不要在被 push 页面的 onAppear 才更新根部 chrome 状态；也不要用 withAnimation 包裹会影响导航事务的全局状态。
pitfalls.titleEn: A white or gray strip flashes at the bottom when pushing a detail page
pitfalls.symptomEn: When NavigationStack pushes a detail page, a white or gray strip flashes at the bottom before the detail content renders. The issue is intermittent and can reproduce across multiple detail pages.
pitfalls.rootCauseEn: Root-level chrome such as a dock, tab bar, or rounded panel depends on a global in-detail flag, but that flag is only set in the pushed page onAppear, one frame after the first render. Wrapping the state change in withAnimation can also entangle the navigation transaction, causing appear/disappear loops, freezes, or a missing back button.
checkEn: Observe whether the flash happens only on the first push frame and then the page looks normal.
Check whether root chrome depends on navigation state updated from the pushed page onAppear.
If adding withAnimation causes freezing or a missing back button, suspect navigation and animation transactions are being mixed.
fixEn: Replace NavigationLink(value:) with a Button when necessary, and set the chrome state synchronously at the routing trigger before pushing.
Use Transaction(disablesAnimations: true) when setting chromeInDetail so the chrome expands instantly on entry.
Use DispatchQueue.main.async { path.append(route) } to push on the next run loop after the chrome has already expanded.
Drive panel height, corner radius, dock, and tab visibility from one derived value such as inDetail = isInDetail || chromeInDetail.
Use the spring slide-in only when returning home. Do not reuse it for entering detail pages.
pitfalls.avoidEn: Do not wait for the pushed page onAppear to update root chrome. Do not wrap global navigation-affecting state in withAnimation unless you are sure it cannot affect the navigation transaction.

pitfalls.title: Home Screen Widget 透明玻璃背景：公开 API 只能接近
pitfalls.symptom: 想做透出桌面壁纸的玻璃 Home Screen Widget。SwiftUI 里用了 Color.clear、containerBackground(for: .widget)、glassEffect 或 ultraThinMaterial，真机桌面仍显示白色卡片。
pitfalls.rootCause: Home Screen Widget 的卡片底色由 WidgetKit / SpringBoard 根据 Widget descriptor 决定，不是普通 SwiftUI 背景。公开 API 能控制内容树和 containerBackground，但不能把 descriptor 标成 transparent / background removable。
check: 确认 Widget 在 Simulator / 真机可添加，但桌面上仍是白底卡片。
确认改 SwiftUI 背景、材质、透明度只影响卡片内部，不能透出壁纸。
如果 descriptor patch 写错后 Widget 从添加列表消失，说明触碰到了 WidgetKit descriptor 枚举路径。
fix: 公开 API 路线只能做近似材质感，接受无法真正移除 Home Screen Widget 宿主卡片的上限。
若明确接受私有 API 风险，可参考 ClearAndBlurredWidgets，在 Widget extension 中 hook descriptor fetch 回调。
patch 目标 CHSWidgetDescriptor 的 backgroundRemovable、transparent、supportsVibrantContent、preferredBackgroundStyle 等字段。
SwiftUI 侧仍提供 Color.clear 的 containerBackground，避免内容树自己画底。
Debug / Release 要分别检查私有 patch 是否进入正确 binary；Xcode 17 Debug 可能在 WidgetExtension.debug.dylib。
pitfalls.avoid: 不要把公开 SwiftUI 背景透明误认为能移除系统 Widget 宿主卡片；私有 descriptor patch 有审核和系统版本风险。
pitfalls.titleEn: Transparent glass Home Screen Widgets are only approximate with public APIs
pitfalls.symptomEn: A Home Screen Widget is intended to show the wallpaper through a glass-like background. Even after using Color.clear, containerBackground(for: .widget), glassEffect, or ultraThinMaterial in SwiftUI, the real Home Screen still shows a white widget card.
pitfalls.rootCauseEn: The Home Screen Widget host background is decided by WidgetKit / SpringBoard through the widget descriptor, not by ordinary SwiftUI background views. Public APIs can control the content tree and containerBackground, but cannot mark the descriptor as transparent or background removable.
checkEn: Confirm the widget can be added on Simulator or device but still appears as a white card on the Home Screen.
Confirm SwiftUI background, material, or opacity changes only affect the inside of the card and do not reveal the wallpaper.
If descriptor patching makes the widget disappear from the add list, the WidgetKit descriptor path was probably patched incorrectly.
fixEn: With public APIs, accept an approximate material look and the limitation that the Home Screen host card cannot be fully removed.
If private API risk is explicitly accepted, study ClearAndBlurredWidgets-style descriptor hook approaches inside the Widget extension.
Patch CHSWidgetDescriptor fields such as backgroundRemovable, transparent, supportsVibrantContent, or preferredBackgroundStyle.
Still provide a Color.clear containerBackground from SwiftUI so the content tree does not draw its own background.
Check Debug and Release separately. Xcode 17 Debug may place widget code in WidgetExtension.debug.dylib.
pitfalls.avoidEn: Do not mistake a transparent SwiftUI background for removal of the system widget host card. Private descriptor patching carries review and OS-version risk.

pitfalls.title: SwiftUI 巨型 @ViewBuilder / 计算属性真机 metadata 递归爆栈
pitfalls.symptom: Settings 页面真机点击进入就闪退，崩溃为 EXC_BAD_ACCESS / Thread stack size exceeded due to excessive recursion。栈里反复出现 SettingsView.debugCard.getter、settingsCard、ViewBuilder helper 和 SettingsView.body.getter；模拟器可能不复现。
pitfalls.rootCause: SwiftUI 在真机上实例化巨型 body 泛型类型 / ViewBuilder metadata 时递归过深。@ViewBuilder 函数、some View 计算属性和泛型 helper 都会塌进父 View.body 的类型图里；再包一层 helper 并不会形成真正边界。
check: 确认是否真机崩、模拟器不一定崩。
查看崩溃报告是否包含 Thread stack size exceeded due to excessive recursion。
观察栈里是否反复出现某个大块 computed view getter、ViewBuilder 或泛型 helper。
检查页面是否由大量 card、section、button、toggle、sheet、alert、#if DEBUG 大块拼成。
fix: 不要只把大块改成另一个 @ViewBuilder helper。
把大块 View 抽成独立 struct: View，例如 DebugSettingsCard(showsPaywall: $showsPaywall)。
让独立 View 类型形成新的 metadata / 子图边界，避免继续摊进父 View.body 的超长泛型图。
Settings / Profile / Dashboard 这类复杂页面，把超过一屏的大块优先拆成独立 View 类型。
修完必须真机 build / install 验证；模拟器通过不能证明该坑消失。
pitfalls.avoid: 不要把巨型 ViewBuilder helper 当作复杂度边界；降低 SwiftUI metadata 压力必须抽成独立 View 类型。
pitfalls.titleEn: Huge SwiftUI @ViewBuilder or computed views can cause metadata recursion on device
pitfalls.symptomEn: Tapping into a settings-style page crashes on a real device with EXC_BAD_ACCESS or Thread stack size exceeded due to excessive recursion. The stack repeatedly shows getters such as a debug card, settings card, ViewBuilder helper, and the parent body getter. The simulator may not reproduce it.
pitfalls.rootCauseEn: On device, SwiftUI can recurse too deeply while instantiating huge body generic types and ViewBuilder metadata. @ViewBuilder functions, some View computed properties, and generic helpers all remain part of the parent View.body type graph; moving code into another helper does not create a real type boundary.
checkEn: Confirm the crash happens on a real device and may not reproduce on the simulator.
Look for Thread stack size exceeded due to excessive recursion in the crash report.
Check whether the stack repeatedly shows a large computed view getter, ViewBuilder, or generic helper.
Inspect whether the page is built from many cards, sections, buttons, toggles, sheets, alerts, or large #if DEBUG blocks.
fixEn: Do not merely move the large block into another @ViewBuilder helper.
Extract the large block into an independent struct conforming to View, such as DebugSettingsCard(showsPaywall: $showsPaywall).
Use the independent View type as a real metadata and type-graph boundary.
For complex Settings, Profile, or Dashboard pages, split blocks larger than one screen into independent View types.
Validate the fix with a real-device build and install. A simulator pass does not prove this pitfall is gone.
pitfalls.avoidEn: Do not treat a huge ViewBuilder helper as a complexity boundary. To reduce SwiftUI metadata pressure, extract independent View types.

pitfalls.title: CloudKit desiredKeys: nil 全量拉导致本地缓存暴涨
pitfalls.symptom: 开启 iCloud 同步后，打开 App 什么都不做，存储占用持续从 2G 涨到 8G、18G、60G+。共享相册设备尤其明显。删掉启动时清理 Library/Caches/CloudKit 的兜底代码后，暴涨立刻失控。
pitfalls.rootCause: 同步拉取 database.recordZoneChanges(since:desiredKeys:) 时 desiredKeys 传 nil，导致 CloudKit 下载 zone 里每条记录的 @Attribute(.externalStorage) 大 CKAsset 到 Library/Caches/CloudKit。即使应用层随后判断内容签名没变并丢弃，字节也已落进系统缓存。为拿一条 root 记录却全量 zone 拉取也是同类变体。
check: 不要只看应用层日志；如果日志显示 mods=0 但存储仍在涨，去看 cloudd 日志。
真机抓 syslog，过滤 cloudd / Downloaded asset，确认是否同一 record 的 asset 被反复下载。
检查是否每次切前台触发同步，且 desiredKeys 为 nil。
注意 macOS 没有 timeout 命令；timeout idevicesyslog 可能静默失败。
fix: 把主拉取改成两段式：第一阶段 desiredKeys 白名单只取元数据和内容签名，排除 CKAsset 字段。
第二阶段只对内容签名判定需要采纳云端的记录，用 database.records(for:) 按 ID 补拉完整记录。
补拉判定必须复用真正 import 时的同一个纯函数，避免多拉或漏拉。
只为拿 root / 探测记录时，desiredKeys 传空数组 []，只要 recordID 和系统字段，不带 asset。
删任何启动清缓存这类治标代码前，先确认真正止血逻辑已经补上。
pitfalls.avoid: 不要在 zone 里有大 asset 时用 desiredKeys: nil 做列表、探测或全量比对；应用层跳过不等于系统缓存没下载。
pitfalls.titleEn: CloudKit desiredKeys: nil full fetch can make local cache grow explosively
pitfalls.symptomEn: After enabling iCloud sync, the app keeps growing in storage while doing nothing, for example from 2 GB to 8 GB, 18 GB, or 60 GB+. Shared album devices can be especially affected. Once startup cleanup of Library/Caches/CloudKit is removed, the growth becomes obvious.
pitfalls.rootCauseEn: The sync path calls database.recordZoneChanges(since:desiredKeys:) with desiredKeys set to nil, so CloudKit downloads large CKAsset fields for every record in the zone into Library/Caches/CloudKit. Even if the app later decides the content signature is unchanged and discards the record, the bytes have already landed in the system cache. A full-zone fetch just to read a root or probe record is the same class of bug.
checkEn: Do not rely only on app logs. If logs show mods=0 while storage still grows, inspect cloudd logs.
Capture device syslog and filter for cloudd / Downloaded asset to confirm whether the same assets are repeatedly downloaded.
Check whether sync runs on every foreground entry and whether desiredKeys is nil.
Remember macOS does not provide the Linux timeout command by default; timeout idevicesyslog may fail silently.
fixEn: Change the main fetch to a two-phase strategy: first fetch only metadata and content signatures with a desiredKeys whitelist that excludes CKAsset fields.
In phase two, call database.records(for:) by record ID only for records whose content signature says the cloud version must be adopted.
Reuse the exact pure function used by import logic to decide whether a full record is needed, avoiding both over-fetching and missed updates.
For root/probe records, pass desiredKeys as an empty array [] when only recordID and system fields are needed.
Before deleting any startup cache cleanup workaround, verify the real asset-fetch prevention is in place.
pitfalls.avoidEn: Do not use desiredKeys: nil for listing, probing, or full comparison when a zone contains large assets. Skipping at the app layer does not mean CloudKit avoided downloading the bytes.

pitfalls.title: CKShare 同步失败与删除照片复活
pitfalls.symptom: 双人共享相册里 participant 侧频繁提示共享已失效、需要重新邀请；同时在一台设备删除的照片过一阵又自己回来，尤其在接受邀请或重连之后。
pitfalls.rootCause: 两个 bug 叠加：permissionFailure（CKError code 10）在 owner 尚未把 participant 升级到 readWrite 的握手窗口里是瞬时态，却被误判为共享永久失效；接受邀请时 resetLocalSyncIdentity() 又清空了 pending-delete / deleted-day 删除墓碑。共享相册是只增不删模型，墓碑一清，云端从未真删的记录会全量 import，导致照片复活。
check: 按 owner / participant 角色分开排查；只有 participant 出问题时，优先检查共享 zone 权限与 accept / reset 流程。
如果现象是删了又回来，且同步模型是只增不删，检查删除墓碑是否在 reset / accept / 清缓存中被清空。
检查 permissionFailure 是否被放进了共享永久失效错误集合。
fix: 把 permissionFailure 移出判定共享失效的错误集合，只保留 unknownItem、zoneNotFound 等更接近永久失效的信号。
resetLocalSyncIdentity() 只清同步身份相关状态，例如 owner 标记、known 集、change token、dirty、adopted LWW。
resetLocalSyncIdentity() 必须保留 pending-delete / deleted-day 删除墓碑；删除是用户意图，不是设备同步身份。
砍掉不能覆盖真实恢复场景的 participant 重置按钮，改为准确提示请相册主重新邀请。
pitfalls.avoid: 不要把 CKError permissionFailure 一律当作共享永久失效；也不要在重置同步身份时清掉删除墓碑。
pitfalls.titleEn: CKShare sync failure and deleted photos coming back
pitfalls.symptomEn: In a shared album, the participant side repeatedly reports that sharing is invalid or needs a new invitation. At the same time, photos deleted on one device later reappear, especially after accepting an invitation or reconnecting.
pitfalls.rootCauseEn: Two bugs combine: permissionFailure (CKError code 10) can be transient while the owner has not yet upgraded the participant to readWrite, but it is incorrectly treated as permanent share invalidation. During invite acceptance, resetLocalSyncIdentity() also clears pending-delete or deleted-day tombstones. In an append-only shared album model, clearing tombstones lets cloud records that were never physically deleted import again, reviving deleted photos.
checkEn: Debug owner and participant roles separately. If only the participant fails, inspect shared-zone permissions and the accept/reset flow first.
If deleted content comes back and the sync model is append-only, check whether tombstones are cleared during reset, accept, or cache cleanup.
Check whether permissionFailure is included in the set of errors treated as permanent share invalidation.
fixEn: Remove permissionFailure from the permanent share invalidation error set. Keep signals closer to permanent invalidation, such as unknownItem and zoneNotFound.
Make resetLocalSyncIdentity() clear only sync identity state such as owner flags, known sets, change tokens, dirty state, and adopted LWW state.
Ensure resetLocalSyncIdentity() preserves pending-delete and deleted-day tombstones. Deletion is user intent, not device sync identity.
Remove participant reset buttons that do not cover real recovery cases. Replace them with accurate guidance asking the album owner to invite again.
pitfalls.avoidEn: Do not treat every CKError permissionFailure as permanent share invalidation. Do not clear deletion tombstones when resetting sync identity.

pitfalls.title: SwiftData/Core Data 外部存储文件丢失导致 NSException abort
pitfalls.symptom: App 在某些设备上闪退，崩溃栈固定出现 -[_PFExternalReferenceData _retrieveExternalData]、-[NSData _bridgingCopy:length:]、objc_exception_throw、abort(SIGABRT)。触发点是 UI 渲染读某张照片 thumbnailData；此前设备经历过存储撑满和 JetsamEvent。
pitfalls.rootCause: SwiftData 图片字段使用 @Attribute(.externalStorage)，底层 Core Data 把大 blob 存成独立文件。当外部文件因磁盘满、JetsamEvent 或写入中断丢失时，主库引用变成悬空引用。读取属性时 Core Data 抛 Objective-C NSException 并 abort；这不是 Swift Error，do/catch、try? 和 NSSetUncaughtExceptionHandler 都拦不住。
check: 查看崩溃栈是否包含 _PFExternalReferenceData _retrieveExternalData、_bridgingCopy、objc_exception_throw。
确认是否点到某条特定数据必崩、其他数据正常；这通常是那条外部 blob 坏了。
用 idevicecrashreport 拉 .ips，解析崩溃线程定位具体读取属性，例如 PhotoAsset.thumbnailData.getter。
检查是否有计算属性或缓存 key 为了算签名反复读取整个 blob。
fix: 新增 Objective-C 桥，用 @try/@catch 包住 blob 读取，并用 NS_SWIFT_NAME(catching(_:)) 暴露给 Swift。
只在 App target 配 bridging header；Widget 等 extension 不应引入。
给模型加 safeXxxData 访问器，通过 OC 桥读取 blob，文件缺失返回 nil 而不是 abort。
所有 UI / 渲染路径改走 safeXxxData，nil 时显示占位图，保持 App 可用。
内容身份、缓存 key 等高频计算不要读 blob，改用内容版本号和状态标志。
pitfalls.avoid: 不要以为 Swift 的 try? 能拦住外部存储文件丢失引发的 NSException；所有 externalStorage blob 读取都要经过安全访问器。
pitfalls.titleEn: Missing SwiftData/Core Data external storage files can cause an uncaught NSException abort
pitfalls.symptomEn: The app crashes on some devices with a stack containing -[_PFExternalReferenceData _retrieveExternalData], -[NSData _bridgingCopy:length:], objc_exception_throw, and abort(SIGABRT). The trigger is UI rendering that reads a specific photo blob, such as thumbnailData, after the device has experienced storage pressure or Jetsam events.
pitfalls.rootCauseEn: A SwiftData image field uses @Attribute(.externalStorage), so Core Data stores large blobs as separate files. If an external file is lost because of full disk, Jetsam, or interrupted writes, the main store keeps a dangling reference. Reading the property makes Core Data throw an Objective-C NSException and abort. This is not a Swift Error, so do/catch, try?, and NSSetUncaughtExceptionHandler cannot catch it.
checkEn: Check whether the crash stack contains _PFExternalReferenceData _retrieveExternalData, _bridgingCopy, and objc_exception_throw.
Confirm whether tapping or rendering one specific record always crashes while other records work. That usually points to one broken external blob.
Pull the .ips crash report with idevicecrashreport and locate the exact property being read, such as PhotoAsset.thumbnailData.getter.
Check whether computed properties or cache keys repeatedly read the full blob just to calculate signatures.
fixEn: Add an Objective-C bridge that wraps blob reads in @try/@catch and exposes the helper to Swift with NS_SWIFT_NAME(catching(_:)).
Add the bridging header only to the app target. Widget extensions should not import it unless explicitly designed for that target.
Add safeXxxData accessors on the model. Read blobs through the Objective-C bridge and return nil instead of aborting when the file is missing.
Route all UI and rendering paths through safeXxxData. Show a placeholder when nil is returned so the app remains usable.
Do not read blobs in high-frequency identity or cache-key calculations. Use content version and state flags instead.
pitfalls.avoidEn: Do not assume Swift try? can catch NSException crashes caused by missing external storage files. Every externalStorage blob read needs a safe accessor.

pitfalls.title: SwiftData fetch 失败被吞成空集合，触发破坏性删除
pitfalls.symptom: 同步通过“上次成功基线减当前本地 ID”推断删除；一次 SwiftData fetch 失败后，代码却把结果当成空集合，随后生成接近全量的删除墓碑或云端删除。用户可能没有执行任何清空操作，也看不到明显报错。
pitfalls.rootCause: (try? modelContext.fetch(...)) ?? [] 把“读取成功且确实为空”和“读取失败、当前状态未知”合并成同一个值。后续用这个伪空集合参与缺席推断，就会把整份历史基线误判为用户删除。危险点不是 try? 本身，而是让降级值进入不可逆的 destructive pipeline。
check: 搜索同步、迁移或批量清理代码里是否存在 (try? fetch(...)) ?? []，并确认结果是否参与删除、覆盖、墓碑或基线计算。
比较异常删除数量与上次成功同步基线；若两者接近，优先怀疑本地枚举失败被伪装成空集合。
确认用户没有执行明确的清空操作，但云端仍收到大量 tombstone / delete。
检查读取错误是否因为 try? 被吞掉，导致日志里只有删除结果而没有 fetch failure。
fix: 所有参与同步裁决的 SwiftData fetch 改为显式 try；任意一项失败就中止整轮同步并保留远端状态。
只有所有必需读取都成功后，才生成完整、可信的本地同步快照。
删除推断、墓碑写入和基线更新只能基于成功快照；失败时全部跳过。
用户明确清空数据必须走独立显式路径，并先按设计处理同步基线，不能靠一次空 fetch 猜意图。
记录 fetch 错误和本轮 aborted，方便区分“没有数据”和“无法读取数据”。
pitfalls.avoid: 不要把“读取失败”降级成空集合后继续做删除推断；破坏性流程必须先证明本地枚举完整可信。
pitfalls.titleEn: A swallowed SwiftData fetch failure can trigger destructive deletes
pitfalls.symptomEn: Sync infers deletions by subtracting current local IDs from the last successful baseline. After one SwiftData fetch fails, the code treats the result as an empty collection and creates nearly full-set tombstones or cloud deletions, even though the user never cleared their data and may see no obvious error.
pitfalls.rootCauseEn: The pattern (try? modelContext.fetch(...)) ?? [] collapses two different states: a successful read that is genuinely empty, and a failed read where local state is unknown. Feeding that fake empty set into absence-based deletion logic makes the entire historical baseline look user-deleted. The dangerous part is allowing a fallback value into an irreversible pipeline.
checkEn: Search sync, migration, or cleanup code for (try? fetch(...)) ?? [] and check whether the result drives deletes, overwrites, tombstones, or baseline updates.
Compare the unexpected delete count with the previous successful baseline. A near match strongly suggests a failed enumeration was treated as empty.
Confirm the user did not explicitly clear data while the cloud still received a large batch of tombstones or deletes.
Check whether try? swallowed the read error, leaving deletion logs but no fetch-failure evidence.
fixEn: Use explicit throwing fetches for every read that participates in sync decisions. Abort the whole pass if any required read fails.
Create a complete, trusted local sync snapshot only after every required read succeeds.
Allow deletion inference, tombstone writes, and baseline updates only from a successful snapshot; skip all of them on failure.
Route an intentional user clear through a separate explicit flow that handles the sync baseline by design, rather than guessing from one empty fetch.
Log the fetch failure and aborted pass so an empty dataset can be distinguished from unreadable data.
pitfalls.avoidEn: Do not turn a read failure into an empty collection and continue deletion inference. A destructive pipeline must first prove that local enumeration is complete and trustworthy.

pitfalls.title: @MainActor 不保证跨 await 的同步事务原子性
pitfalls.symptom: 两个同步入口都在 @MainActor 上操作同一份本地存储，却仍出现新改动被旧同步覆盖、漏传，或被错误写进“已同步”基线。同步进行中再次触发时，简单 isSyncing 守卫还可能直接丢掉真正需要的补跑。
pitfalls.rootCause: Actor 隔离只保证某一时刻执行一段隔离代码；遇到 await 会发生 reentrancy，其他任务或用户编辑可以进入。旧任务恢复后继续用 await 前的快照做裁决，并在上传结束时把当下重新读取的新状态写入基线，就会把从未上传的变化冒充成已同步状态。
check: 确认多个同步入口是否操作同一 ModelContext / store，且流程内部跨越 CloudKit 或网络 await。
搜索 guard !isSyncing else { return } 之类逻辑，判断重叠触发是否被静默丢弃。
检查上传结束后是否重新 fetch 当前本地状态，并直接把它保存成同步基线。
在同步转圈期间编辑或删除数据，观察改动是否本地成功但其他设备收不到，或下轮又被旧云端覆盖。
fix: 给所有读写同一 store 的同步引擎加共享、非重入的顶层 coordinator，并让全部入口经过它。
coordinator 按队列执行，前一任务失败也必须释放下一位；取消的 waiter 不能偷偷进入临界区。
每轮开始冻结完整快照，在每个关键 await 后验证快照前提是否仍成立；不一致就放弃旧裁决并重跑。
上传前冻结实际 payload 对应的 uploaded snapshot；成功后只把这份快照写入基线。
用单调递增 generation 合并重叠请求：当前 pass 完成后至少再跑一轮，不并发也不丢事件。
快照同时包含内容签名和结构字段，避免关系或归属变化因签名未变而漏传。
pitfalls.avoid: 不要把 @MainActor 当作跨 await 的事务锁，也不要用“同步中就 return”丢掉重叠触发；基线只能描述本轮真正上传的 payload。
pitfalls.titleEn: @MainActor does not make an async sync transaction atomic
pitfalls.symptomEn: Two sync entry points both run on @MainActor and touch the same local store, yet new edits are overwritten by an older pass, never uploaded, or incorrectly recorded as already synced. A simple isSyncing guard may also discard a follow-up request that was actually required.
pitfalls.rootCauseEn: Actor isolation allows only one isolated segment to execute at a time, but await introduces reentrancy so another task or user edit can enter. When the old task resumes, it can decide from a pre-await snapshot, then re-fetch current local state after upload and write changes it never uploaded into the successful baseline.
checkEn: Confirm whether multiple sync entry points use the same ModelContext or store and cross CloudKit or network await points.
Search for guards such as guard !isSyncing else { return } and determine whether overlapping triggers are silently dropped.
Check whether the code re-fetches current local state after upload and stores that state directly as the sync baseline.
Edit or delete data while sync is in progress and observe whether the local change succeeds but never reaches another device, or is later overwritten by older cloud state.
fixEn: Put every sync engine that reads or writes the same store behind one shared, non-reentrant top-level coordinator.
Queue passes correctly: an error must release the next waiter, and a cancelled waiter must not enter the critical section later.
Freeze a complete snapshot at pass start and revalidate its assumptions after every important await. Restart when the snapshot is stale.
Freeze the uploaded snapshot that exactly matches the outgoing payload and write only that snapshot into the baseline after success.
Use a monotonic generation to coalesce overlapping requests into at least one follow-up pass instead of running concurrently or dropping events.
Include structural fields as well as content signatures in the snapshot so relationship or ownership changes cannot be missed.
pitfalls.avoidEn: Do not treat @MainActor as a transaction lock across await, and do not drop overlapping triggers with an early return. The baseline must describe the payload that was actually uploaded.

pitfalls.title: 损坏 blob 被降级为 nil，反向抹掉云端资产
pitfalls.symptom: externalStorage 已用安全读取避免崩溃，但同步上传仍把读取失败返回的 nil 当成合法可选值，构造缺少 CKAsset 的记录并覆盖云端。结果是一台设备的本地损坏扩散到云端和其他健康设备。
pitfalls.rootCause: 单个 optional nil 无法表达来源：它既可能是业务上本来没有该资产，也可能是外部文件引用损坏后被异常边界降级。防崩溃的读取容错只说明进程可以继续运行，不代表这份本地 payload 完整可信、适合写回云端。
check: 确认 UI 已改走 safe blob accessor，但上传代码是否仍逐个读取 raw blob 或互相独立的 safe optional。
检查是否只有经历磁盘满、写入中断或外部文件丢失的设备同步后，其他设备的资产也随之消失。
如果 CloudKit 写入成功且没有 error，但记录字段变少，优先检查 nil 是否来自读取失败。
检查上传接口是否接收一组 optional，而不是一次性验证完整性的 coherent snapshot。
fix: 在同一个 Objective-C @try/@catch 边界内读取一条记录上传所需的全部 blob。
只有所有读取动作成功且必需字段存在时，才创建 coherent upload snapshot；此时可选字段的 nil 才代表真实业务值。
snapshot 创建失败就中止该记录或整轮破坏性同步，保留云端健康副本，绝不提交半残 payload。
UI、导出、Widget、修复服务、签名计算和所有云端上传路径统一使用安全访问器或 coherent snapshot。
分别测试异常读取能被拦截，以及合法 optional nil 能被保留，防止把两种语义再次混在一起。
pitfalls.avoid: 不要把安全读取返回的 nil 直接送进云端写入；读取不崩只解决可用性，写入前还必须证明整份 payload 一致且完整。
pitfalls.titleEn: Treating a damaged blob as a valid nil can erase cloud assets
pitfalls.symptomEn: Safe externalStorage reads prevent a crash, but sync treats a nil returned after a read failure as a legitimate optional value. It then uploads a record without the CKAsset and overwrites the healthy cloud copy, propagating one device's local corruption to other devices.
pitfalls.rootCauseEn: An isolated optional nil does not carry provenance: the asset may genuinely be absent, or the external file may be damaged and downgraded by an exception boundary. Crash-tolerant reading only proves the process can continue; it does not prove the local payload is complete, coherent, or safe to write back to the cloud.
checkEn: Confirm the UI uses safe blob accessors while upload code still reads raw blobs or separate safe optionals one by one.
Check whether assets disappear on other devices only after a device with full-disk, interrupted-write, or missing-external-file history syncs.
If the CloudKit save succeeds without an error but fields vanish, inspect whether nil came from a failed read.
Check whether the upload API accepts a loose group of optionals instead of one coherent snapshot whose completeness was validated.
fixEn: Read every blob required for one upload inside the same Objective-C @try/@catch boundary.
Create a coherent upload snapshot only when every read succeeds and all required fields exist; only then can optional nil mean a real business value.
If snapshot creation fails, abort that record or the destructive pass and preserve the healthy cloud copy instead of sending a partial payload.
Route UI, export, widgets, repair services, signature logic, and every cloud upload path through safe accessors or coherent snapshots.
Test exception-backed read failure separately from a legitimate optional nil so the two meanings cannot collapse again.
pitfalls.avoidEn: Do not feed nil from a safe read directly into a cloud write. Avoiding a crash solves availability; upload safety still requires a coherent and complete payload.

pitfalls.title: CKShare 只记 root 名会造成身份歧义与串错共享数据
pitfalls.symptom: 用户只完成过一次明确邀请，设备却提示检测到多个共享数据集；接收方可能只看到 owner 选项，恢复后仍无法正确绑定。private 与 shared database 中往往堆积了用户取消、重试或旧版本留下的多个历史 root。
pitfalls.rootCause: 分享流程在系统邀请 UI 完成前就保存 root / CKShare，取消后又没有回滚；本地只记 rootRecordName，缺少 container、账号、角色、zone owner 和 share ID，无法唯一标识数据集。Discovery 还可能扫到多个 private root 就提前返回，根本没检查 shared database，同时角色边界过松让 participant 走进 owner-only 路径。
check: 先读取本地完整共享身份，确认是否只有旧 root marker，而没有 container、账号、角色、zone 与 share 信息。
在 private database 枚举所有候选 root，并读取对应 CKShare 与参与者状态。
在 shared database 按 zone owner 枚举可见 root，不能因为 private 侧有歧义就提前停止。
只有两端最终指向同一 root 与同一 share，且角色分别为 owner / participant，才算恢复成功。
不要从历史 root 数量直接推断用户真正完成过多少次邀请；创建时机本身就会留下残留。
fix: 持久化精确身份：containerIdentifier、accountRecordName、role、zoneName、zoneOwnerName、rootRecordName、shareRecordName。
正常同步只接受精确身份；账号变化、share 不匹配或记录不存在时 fail closed，绝不猜一个 root 自动接管。
迁移旧版本时完整扫描 private 与 shared database，再统一决策，不能在其中一边提前返回。
只有唯一 owner 或唯一 participant 才能自动迁移；多候选或跨角色并存必须暂停并要求显式恢复。
UI 与服务层都按角色建立硬边界：participant 不能进入 owner-only 的创建或邀请流程。
多候选按真实数据完整度、更新时间和稳定 ID 排序；两端应对同一组数据选出相同 canonical root。
清理历史 root 前先审计并合并独有内容与删除墓碑，验证两端一致后再删除。
pitfalls.avoid: 不要只凭 rootRecordName 猜共享身份，也不要简单“保留最新 root、删除其他”；先确定两端 canonical share 并合并独有内容与删除意图。
pitfalls.titleEn: A CKShare root name alone cannot safely identify a shared dataset
pitfalls.symptomEn: A user completes one clear invitation, yet devices report multiple shared datasets; the recipient may see only owner choices and recovery still binds incorrectly. Private and shared databases often contain historical roots left by cancellation, retries, or older app versions.
pitfalls.rootCauseEn: The sharing flow saves a root and CKShare before the system invitation UI completes and does not roll them back on cancellation. Local state stores only rootRecordName, omitting the container, account, role, zone owner, and share ID needed for unique identity. Discovery may also stop after ambiguous private roots without scanning the shared database, while weak role boundaries let participants enter owner-only paths.
checkEn: Read the complete local sharing identity first and determine whether the app stores only a legacy root marker without container, account, role, zone, and share fields.
Enumerate every candidate root in the private database and inspect its CKShare and participant state.
Enumerate visible roots in the shared database by zone owner; do not stop merely because the private side is ambiguous.
Treat recovery as successful only when both devices point to the same root and share with the correct owner and participant roles.
Do not infer how many invitations the user completed from the number of historical roots; object-creation timing can create leftovers by itself.
fixEn: Persist a precise identity containing containerIdentifier, accountRecordName, role, zoneName, zoneOwnerName, rootRecordName, and shareRecordName.
Accept only that precise identity during normal sync. Fail closed on account changes, share mismatch, or missing records instead of guessing a root.
During legacy migration, scan both private and shared databases completely before making one combined decision.
Auto-migrate only a unique owner or unique participant candidate. Pause and require explicit recovery when candidates or roles are ambiguous.
Enforce hard role boundaries in both UI and services so a participant cannot enter owner-only creation or invitation flows.
Rank candidates by real data completeness, update time, and stable ID so both sides choose the same canonical root from the same data.
Before deleting historical roots, audit and merge unique content and tombstones, then verify both devices against the canonical share.
pitfalls.avoidEn: Do not guess sharing identity from rootRecordName alone, and do not simply keep the newest root and delete the rest. Establish the canonical share on both sides and merge unique content and deletion intent first.

pitfalls.title: UICloudSharingController 点“完成”后 SwiftUI 永久 loading
pitfalls.symptom: Owner 或 participant 打开系统 Cloud sharing 面板后，participant 入口可能几乎没有独有信息；更严重的是用户不做修改、只点“完成”返回 App，SwiftUI 的 working 状态一直不复位，相关操作全部 disabled，直到重启。
pitfalls.rootCause: UICloudSharingController 对 owner 与 participant 提供的能力不同，participant 面板常与 App 自有退出入口重复。生命周期上，控制器通过自己的 Done 按钮程序化 dismiss 时不会调用 presentationControllerDidDismiss；如果代码只监听 save、stop sharing、failure 和 interactive dismissal，就漏掉无修改的 Done 路径，completion 永远不执行。
check: 确认系统面板已经消失，但 SwiftUI isWorking / loading 状态仍为 true。
分别测试下拉交互关闭和系统导航栏 Done；若前者正常、后者稳定卡住，优先怀疑 programmatic dismissal。
检查 UIAdaptivePresentationControllerDelegate 已设置却仍无回调，避免被 presentationControllerDidDismiss 的名字误导。
列出 UICloudSharingControllerDelegate 的 save、stop、failure 回调，确认是否缺少通用 cancel / done 收尾。
fix: 按角色精简入口：Owner 保留成员管理；participant 若没有独有操作，可只保留退出共享和立即同步。
使用能感知最终 disappearance 的 UICloudSharingController 子类，为无修改的 Done dismiss 补发 cancelled outcome。
所有 save、stop、interactive dismiss、Done dismiss 路径统一进入幂等 completeIfNeeded，最多收尾一次。
completeIfNeeded 先取走 completion 并清理引用，再回调 SwiftUI，避免重入或重复完成。
cancelled 只负责解除 loading 并刷新共享状态，不伪装成保存成功，也不额外修改共享关系。
pitfalls.avoid: 不要假设 presentationControllerDidDismiss 覆盖所有关闭方式；打开系统控制器前锁住 UI 时，必须为每条终止路径提供幂等收尾。
pitfalls.titleEn: UICloudSharingController Done dismissal can leave SwiftUI loading forever
pitfalls.symptomEn: After an owner or participant opens the system Cloud sharing controller, the participant view may offer little unique value. More critically, if the user makes no changes and taps Done, SwiftUI can remain permanently busy with every related action disabled until relaunch.
pitfalls.rootCauseEn: UICloudSharingController exposes different capabilities by role, and the participant panel can duplicate an app's own leave-sharing flow. For lifecycle handling, a dismissal initiated by the controller's own Done button does not call presentationControllerDidDismiss. Code that listens only for save, stop-sharing, failure, and interactive dismissal misses the unchanged Done path, so its completion never runs.
checkEn: Confirm the system controller has disappeared while the SwiftUI isWorking or loading state remains true.
Test swipe-to-dismiss and the navigation-bar Done button separately. If the former works and the latter consistently sticks, suspect programmatic dismissal.
Check whether UIAdaptivePresentationControllerDelegate is installed but still receives no callback; do not assume presentationControllerDidDismiss covers every dismissal.
List the save, stop, and failure callbacks from UICloudSharingControllerDelegate and confirm whether a general cancel or Done completion path is missing.
fixEn: Make entry points role-specific: keep member management for owners, and omit the participant panel when leave-sharing and sync actions already cover its useful behavior.
Use a UICloudSharingController subclass that detects final disappearance and emits a cancelled outcome for an unchanged Done dismissal.
Route save, stop, interactive dismissal, and Done dismissal through one idempotent completeIfNeeded function that can finish only once.
Inside completeIfNeeded, take and clear the completion and controller references before calling back into SwiftUI to avoid reentrancy or duplicate completion.
Treat cancelled as a request to clear loading and refresh sharing state, not as a successful save or a reason to mutate the share.
pitfalls.avoidEn: Do not assume presentationControllerDidDismiss covers every way a system controller can close. If the UI is locked before presentation, every termination path needs an idempotent completion.

purposeEn: A sanitized bilingual index of real iOS / Swift pitfalls for agents to match symptoms, logs, root causes, checks, and fixes before proposing changes.
